text: Hey, I keep getting an error msg when I try to save my settings, like, it says 'failed to save'?? It’s only happening on this one profile. Can u help??
wait, so if I switch to pro will I lose my current benefits or not? really confused here.
I can’t log into my account, but I know my password is correct.

I was wondering if there are any plans to introduce a feature that allows us to customize the dashboard interface, as I think it could really enhance user experience. Is this something on the roadmap for future updates?

I can't believe I waited so long to get help and now my issue isn't even being addressed! My order from last month was supposed to arrive on the 15th, and now I just see ‘shipped’ with no updates. This is so frustrating because I had planned a surprise for my sister's birthday and now it's ruined. Why does it take forever to get a proper response? It's always the same excuses! What am I supposed to do now?
hey, i reached out last week about my order and got no reply. this is really frustrating, can you please help me out??

I was wondering if you have any information regarding the scheduled maintenance for this weekend. I've heard it might happen, but I'm not entirely sure if it's confirmed or just a rumor. Could you clarify that for me, please? It seems that some channels are saying yes and others are saying no, which is quite confusing.

I've been trying to figure out the exact differences between the various subscription tiers, specifically between the pro and business options. It seems like they both offer great features, but I can't quite grasp what sets them apart. Can you provide a detailed comparison? I'm looking for clarity on this because it affects my decision on which one to choose.

I'm really frustrated right now! I just discovered that my account settings changed out of nowhere after I attempted to update my email preferences. Now it shows an old address that I haven’t used in ages. I've tried logging out and back in, but that didn't fix anything. It feels like a bad joke! Can someone help me get back to my correct email before I miss important updates?
Hey, my app keeps crashing every time I try to upload a photo. It's super frustrating, and I can't even tell if it's my phone or what. Can you help?
Can I get a refund and also check my account balance? The info is all mixed up.
I can't log into my account, it keeps saying wrong password.

I am experiencing an issue where the application crashes unexpectedly when attempting to upload files exceeding 10MB. This seems to occur only in specific scenarios, such as when using the latest version of Chrome on Windows 11. Could you provide guidance on resolving this problem?
My app won't load, says error 503. Tried reinstalling but still stuck. Plz help!
I can't believe how frustrating this has been. My order is late again! I need help, but no one seems to care.

I am experiencing issues with the application crashing every time I try to open it. This started happening after the last update. I've tried uninstalling and reinstalling the app, but it still doesn’t work. Can you help me fix this?
